temporal_description: A close-up shot shows a woman with long, dark hair lying on her stomach in deep snow. She is wearing a light blue, puffy jacket. Her face is contorted in a look of terror, with her mouth open as if screaming. She thrashes her head and moves her hands frantically in the snow, trying to free herself. Behind her, a dark wooden structure with frosted glass panes is visible. The scene is dimly lit, creating a cold and dangerous atmosphere. The camera remains static, focusing on her desperate struggle. A woman's voice, high-pitched and filled with pure terror, cries out in a panicked, desperate tone, "I can't get out!" Her voice is strained and shaky, conveying a sense of being trapped and in great distress. The background is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient sound, creating a chilling and isolated atmosphere that amplifies the feeling of danger and entrapment. The camera cuts to a wide, static shot of a large, dark wooden building at night, partially obscured by a massive snowdrift. The building is illuminated by a single bright light from a lantern, casting long shadows and creating a stark contrast against the deep blue of the night and the white snow. A lone, silhouetted figure stands on the snow-covered ground in front of the building, appearing small and isolated in the vast, dark landscape. The heavy snowfall is visible, blanketing the entire scene.
